texto: Sometimes all that’s needed to heal a wounded soul and lift a sagging spirit is one loving listener, for at its core, listening is love–love that sacrifices its need to be heard in favor of hearing, a desire to lecture in favor of learning, an opportunity to show off in favor of showing compassion. Instead of always leading the way, a patient listener, just by nodding in all the right places, can help a wanderer discover the right path on her own.
explicacao: Citação de Claudia Barba sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Sometimes all that’s needed to heal a wounded soul and lift a sagging spirit is one loving listen…” articula sabedoria, christianity, listening em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como listening.
